advanced_order_boundary.reason: Coinone v2/v2.1 spot order runtime exposes single place/cancel and native cancel-all, but no documented shared amend, OCO/OTO/order-list, native batch place, or native batch cancel API. Gateway-composed batch cancel is not exposed as a P4 native advanced-order capability.

notes: Coinone adapter is limited to KRW spot market data, single orders, native cancel-all, balances, fees and fills. Payment, wallet withdrawal/deposit, fiat transfer APIs, and native advanced-order amend/order-list/batch APIs are intentionally outside the gateway surface.
